# Sun Beach House

> Luxury villa rental, sales, and bespoke concierge services in Saint-Barthélemy (Saint-Barth), French West Indies. Founded by Valérie Kerckhofs, an experienced real estate professional based on the island since 1996.

## Entity

- **Name**: Sun Beach House
- **Founder**: Valérie Kerckhofs (on Saint-Barth since 1996)
- **Address**: 65 Rue de la Paix, Gustavia 97133, Saint-Barthélemy
- **Phone**: +590 690 63 47 25
- **Email**: valerie@sun-beach-house.com
- **Coordinates**: 17.8967, -62.8497
- **Languages**: French (primary), English, Spanish, Portuguese

## Services

- Seasonal luxury villa rentals in Saint-Barthélemy
- Luxury property sales in Saint-Barthélemy
- Private concierge: private chefs, in-villa spa, VIP transfers, restaurant reservations, yachting and nautical activities, private air travel coordination, VIP airport services

## Key pages

- [About / The Spirit](https://www.sun-beach-house.com/fr/about): Founder story, philosophy, approach
- [Conciergerie](https://www.sun-beach-house.com/fr/conciergerie): Full concierge service catalogue
- [Destinations](https://www.sun-beach-house.com/fr/destinations): Saint-Barthélemy history, culture, neighborhoods (Gustavia, Saint-Jean, Corossol, Pointe Milou)
- [Villa rentals](https://www.sun-beach-house.com/fr/rentals): Seasonal rental collection
- [Villas for sale](https://www.sun-beach-house.com/fr/sales): Properties for sale
- [Contact](https://www.sun-beach-house.com/fr/contact): Direct contact with Valérie

## Localized versions

The site is available in fr, en, es, pt. Replace the `/fr/` segment with `/en/`, `/es/`, or `/pt/` for translated versions of every page.
